2. pending_mandatory_tools tracking
   - brain-state.ts:162 - Field defined in BrainState

   - soft-governance.ts:315-318 - Removes when tool used
   - soft-governance.ts:627-632 - Adds after task/write

3. Governance signals (soft-governance.ts:320-341)
   - Emits toast when pending tools ignored ✓
   - Increments out_of_order counter ✓
   - Severity computed from repetition ✓
   - Localized messages (en/vi) ✓

4. Advisory enforcement (tool-gate.ts)
   - Line 89: allowed: boolean - Always true ✓
   - Lines 157-166: Role mismatch = advisory ✓
   - Lines 186-195: Framework conflict = advisory ✓
   - Lines 209-218: No session = advisory ✓
   - Lines 229-238: Locked session = advisory ✓

5. Gatekeeper validation (gatekeeper.ts:67-75)
   - Checks pending_mandatory_tools length ✓

   - Severity: "warning" ✓
